title: Caregiver support review

examination.text: Supports clinician-documented driving information and review of carer information, assessment, education, and support needs.
examination.rationale: The exact dementia carer-support section supports interval caregiver needs, physical and mental wellbeing, education, support access, preferences and carer assessment without assuming dementia or prescribing services.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented driving information and review of carer information, assessment, education, and support needs.

source.title: Dementia: assessment, management and support for people living with dementia and their carers

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.6 and 1.11.1–1.11.8 — driving information and carer support

treatment_and_management.text: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports documenting emerging support needs, care coordination, clinician-entered plans, follow-up and questions.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports flexible or prescheduled monitoring, review of emerging needs, a named coordinator, and documented care and support planning.

source_limitations: Non-dementia caregiving, carer identity, consent, burden tool, safeguarding, service eligibility, and referral remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
